narrative:
Precinct Willshire (precinct in Van Wert County) has 631 registered voters, with 60.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 29.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 10.1%, a pronounced Republican lean of 19.3 percentage points.
